exam_name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2023 Data Science Professional (1Z0-1109-23)

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers or online proctored (OnVUE)

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match Pearson VUE registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. On-screen calculator for applicable exams. Proctor monitors throughout.
renewal_options: Oracle certifications are version-specific. When Oracle releases a new database/platform version, a new exam version is typically released. Previous certifications remain valid as earned.

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period after failed attempt. Maximum 3 attempts per exam in a 12-month period. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: Oracle University
official_study_resources.notes: Official Oracle training courses and learning paths

official_study_resources.title: Oracle Exam Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice tests available through Oracle University

aliases: oracle cloud infrastructure 2023 data science professional
